name: Expensify Integration Server API
description: The Expensify Integration Server API enables programmatic export of expense report data, card reconciliation, employee provisioning (advanced employee updater), and report downloading. All requests are form-encoded POSTs to a single endpoint. Rate limits: 5 requests per 10 seconds, 20 per 60 seconds.
